title: ExchangeRatesResponse
description: Standard response object for latest and historical exchange rate endpoints

disclaimer.description: Legal disclaimer URL for data usage terms

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (UTC) when rates were last published

base.description: 3-letter ISO currency code of the base currency

rates.description: Map of 3-letter ISO currency codes to exchange rates relative to base

additionalProperties.description: Exchange rate relative to the base currency
